params.title: RP LLM (Roleplay Model)
params.description:
This is the creative model that generates roleplay responses.

KoboldCPP default: http://localhost:5001
Ollama default: http://localhost:11434

params.title: Instruct LLM (State Extraction)
params.description:
A smaller model that extracts character state changes (location, knowledge, items...) from the RP response.

Ollama recommended with llama3, phi3, or gemma2.

params.text:
# PinokioLangGraph — Agent Configuration
# =======================================
# Created by install.json. Edit directly or re-run Install.

[agent]
# Port the agent listens on
port = 8001

[rp_llm]
# Creative roleplay model (writes narrative prose)
url = {{input.rp_url || 'http://localhost:5001'}}
backend = {{input.rp_backend || 'kobold'}}
model = {{input.rp_model || ''}}
api_key = none
# Set to true to skip all calls to the RP LLM (useful for debugging)
disabled = false

[instruct_llm]
# State extraction model (pulls JSON from narrative)
url = {{input.instruct_url || 'http://localhost:11434'}}
backend = {{input.instruct_backend || 'ollama'}}
model = {{input.instruct_model || 'llama3'}}
api_key = none
# Set to true to skip all calls to the Instruct LLM (useful for debugging)
disabled = false

[pipeline]
# Internal planning passes before generating (0 = off)
thinking_steps = 0
# Post-generation review passes (0 = off)
refinement_steps = 0
# User/assistant pairs sent to RP LLM (0 = all)
history_count = 2

[templates]
# Message format for each LLM: chatml, llama3, alpaca, mistral, raw
rp = raw
instruct = raw

[paths]
# Where session databases are stored (relative to app/)
db_dir = ./dbs
# Where prompt YAML files live (relative to app/)
prompts_dir = ./prompts

[agent_settings]
# Max messages in the context window
context_window_messages = 20
# State entries to retrieve from DB
db_retrieval_count = 10

[debug]
# Set to true to enable verbose logging (shows everything in the Pinokio terminal)
debug_mode = false
# Set to true to run the full pipeline WITHOUT sending anything to either LLM
# The agent will log exactly what it received from ST and what it WOULD send
dry_run = false

params.title: Installation Complete!
params.description:
PinokioLangGraph is installed.

SillyTavern setup:
1. Install the Agent-StateSync extension: https://github.com/drago87/Agent-StateSync
2. In SillyTavern: Connect → OpenAI API
3. Proxy URL: http://localhost:8001
4. API Key: anything
5. Model: langgraph-agent

Then click Start to launch the Agent.

Config file: app/config.ini (edit anytime to change settings)
